Steel Fire Door Manufacturer
Acoustic Metal Doors with Powder Coating Finish
Electrical Shaft Doors with Powder Coating Finish
Full Glazed Gi Steel Fire Door with Powder Coating Finish
Clean Room Doors with Powder Coating Finish
Fire Rating: 60, 90, and 120 minutes (tested in accordance with BS: 476 Parts 20 and 22 and IS: 3614 Part 2)
Core Choices: Ceramic Wool, Rockwool, or Honeycomb
Sheet Thickness: The thickness of the sheet can be adjusted from 0.8 to 1.6 mm.
Structure: A 1.2–2.0 mm thick pressed steel frame
Finish: Paint or powder coating with a variety of color options
Hardware: Vision panels, door closers, panic bars, and sturdy hinges are available upon request.
Type: There are options for single and double leaves.
